summary: A/B Hero Headline Testing Complete - All backend and frontend tests passed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed covering results endpoint, assignment, conversion tracking, and public ab-impression. Frontend: Landing page hero shows correct variant with data-variant attribute, CTA clicks track both ab/convert and ab-impression events. Admin Dashboard A/B Tests section shows hero_headline experiment with clean table (Variant, Impressions, Clicks, CTR%, Paywall%, Confidence%, Status) and CONTROL badge.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlaps with content - minor visual issue (same as previous iterations)

details: GET /api/ab/results?experiment_id=hero_headline returns correct structure
Returns 2 variants: headline_a (Control) and headline_b (Challenger)
Experiment name: 'Hero Headline — Week 1 (A vs B)'
Primary event: experience_click, Secondary event: paywall_shown
Min sessions per variant: 500, Confidence needed: 95%
Each variant has: sessions, impressions, clicks, ctr, paywall_rate
Confidence percentage calculated via z-test
POST /api/ab/assign with session_id + experiment_id returns sticky variant
Returns variant_id, variant_idx, variant_data (heading, badge, subtitle)
Same session_id always gets same variant (idempotent) - verified 3x
Different session_ids get roughly 50/50 split (tested 100 sessions)
Invalid experiment_id returns 404
POST /api/ab/convert tracks experience_click event
POST /api/ab/convert tracks paywall_shown event
POST /api/ab/convert tracks impression event
POST /api/ab/convert tracks click event
Duplicate conversions are deduplicated (dedupe: true)
Invalid event type returns 400
POST /api/public/ab-impression includes traffic_source and session_id fields
Works with all traffic sources: direct, instagram, organic, referral, internal
Tracks cta_click action
Hero section shows correct headline text based on assigned variant
data-variant attribute on hero heading reflects assigned variant (headline_a or headline_b)
Control variant shows: 'Create stories kids will remember forever'
Challenger variant shows: 'Create award-worthy AI stories in minutes'
Hero badge and subtitle match variant data
CTA buttons visible and functional
CTA click triggers POST /api/ab/convert with event: experience_click
CTA click triggers POST /api/public/ab-impression with action: cta_click
Both requests include session_id, experiment_id, traffic_source
A/B Tests section accessible via data-testid='section-ab_testing'
hero_headline experiment displayed with data-testid='ab-exp-hero_headline'
Table has required columns: Variant, Impressions, Clicks, CTR %, Paywall %, Confidence %, Status
Control variant shows 'CONTROL' badge
Status shows 'X more needed' when sessions < 500
Confidence percentage displayed (23.7% at time of test)
Assignment is deterministic via MD5 hash of session_id + experiment_id
Same session always maps to same variant index

critical_code_review_comments: A/B experiment seeding is idempotent - skips existing experiments
Variant assignment uses MD5 hash for deterministic 50/50 split
Conversion events are deduplicated per session/experiment/event
Winner requires both min_sessions (500) AND confidence >= 95%
Frontend caches variant in localStorage for instant render on return visits
seed_data_creation: A/B experiments seeded on server startup via /api/ab/seed endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: A/B Hero Headline experiment (hero_headline) is fully functional. Key findings: (1) 2 variants - headline_a (Control: 'Create stories kids will remember forever') and headline_b (Challenger: 'Create award-worthy AI stories in minutes'), (2) Assignment is deterministic via MD5 hash, (3) Frontend tracks both ab/convert and ab-impression on CTA clicks, (4) Admin dashboard shows clean table with all required columns, (5) Winner requires 500 sessions per variant AND 95% confidence. Current stats at test time: headline_a: 60 impressions, headline_b: 67 impressions, confidence: 23.7%.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real - no mocking

playwright_results.hero_heading_text: PASS ('Create award-worthy AI stories in minutes')
playwright_results.ab_table_columns: PASS (Variant, Impressions, Clicks, CTR %, Paywall %, Confidence %, Status)
